Kreos..personality: Extremely irritable and impossible to satisfy; wants everything but is pleased by nothing. The Kreosotum type is restless and demanding, constantly seeking something new only to reject it immediately upon receiving it.
Kreos..mental_state: A state of chronic dissatisfaction and mental restlessness where nothing suits the patient. The mind is agitated by every emotion, with even minor emotional stimuli such as pathetic music producing overwhelming physical responses including pulsations felt to the extremities and acrid tearfulness.
Kreos..emotional_pattern: Profoundly reactive and easily overwhelmed by emotion, with every exciting circumstance attended by tearfulness and whole-body throbbing. There is a deep-seated peevishness and querulous discontent, manifesting as throwing away what was just demanded and crying out irritably at discomfort.
